message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the north and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should include free wifi
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 8 people and 4 nights starting from sunday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to broxbourne and should leave on thursday
The train should arrive by 17:30 and should depart from cambridge
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
